title: PM E-DRIVE Scheme: Electric Vehicle Sales Soar
content: The PM E-DRIVE Scheme, launched on October 1, 2024, with a budget of Rs. 10,900 crore, aims to boost EV adoption, develop charging infrastructure, and enhance domestic EV manufacturing. It offers subsidies for electric two-wheelers, three-wheelers, ambulances, trucks, and buses. Key components include grants for e-buses and charging stations, with incentives provided through e-vouchers linked to the schemeâ€™s portal. The initiative focuses on advanced battery-equipped EVs and excludes government-owned vehicle purchases. The scheme, valid until March 2026, also includes upgrading testing facilities and targets substantial job creation and reduced emissions, aligning with Indiaâ€™s sustainability goals.
author: Analysts Account
